common.thankYouAgainForChoosing: Thank you again for choosing SignXpert.
common.thankYouForWorking: Thank you for working with SignXpert!
common.noVatSmallBusiness: No VAT is charged under the small business exemption (§ 19 UStG).
common.noVatAccording: No VAT is charged according to § 19 UStG.
common.germanVatLine: DE461817538 Gemäß § 19 UStG wird keine Umsatzsteuer berechnet/
email.paid.adminIntro: Payment has been received for the following order on SignXpert.
email.paid.adminFollowup: The customer completed the payment through their My Orders page.
email.paymentReceived.successfullyReceiv: We have successfully received it for Order
email.paymentReceived.checkStatus: You can check the detailed status of your order anytime in your account.
email.password.subject: SignXpert - Password Recovery for
email.password.title: Password Recovery for SignXpert
email.password.heading: Password Recovery for SignXpert
email.password.requestIntro: We received a request to reset your password on SignXpert.
email.password.securityNote: For security, we recommend changing it to a new password immediately after logging in.
email.password.inYourAccount: in your account to update your password.
email.password.ifNotRequest: If you didn't request a password reset, please ignore this email.
email.welcome.subject: Welcome to SignXpert. Your account is ready!
email.welcome.heading: Your account is ready! Welcome to SignXpert
email.welcome.excited: We’re excited to have you with us.
email.welcome.accountCreated: Your account has been successfully created, and you can now start designing your projects.
email.welcome.editorPitch: Our online editor is available right in your browser — the fastest way to bring your ideas to life.
email.adminRegister.title: Нова реєстрація клієнта
email.adminRegister.heading: A new customer has registered
email.adminRegister.intro: A new customer has registered on the SignXpert website.
email.adminRegister.tellUsHeader: Please tell us where you heard about us:
email.adminRegister.fullProfileNote: You can view the full customer profile in the admin panel.
email.adminNewOrder.heading: New Order Received
email.adminNewOrder.intro: A new order has been placed on the SignXpert website.
email.created.subject: SignXpert - Order Received
email.created.title: SignXpert Order Confirmation
email.created.heading: Your order has been received – SignXpert
email.created.thankYou: Thank you very much for your order — we truly appreciate your trust in SignXpert.
email.created.body1: We have successfully received your order. Our team will soon begin reviewing all project details to ensure everything is exactly as requested. You will receive a separate email once we start this review.
email.created.followStatus: You can follow the status of your order at any time in your account.
email.created.contactCorrection: If you notice anything that needs correction, please contact us as soon as possible.
email.printed.subject: SignXpert - Order Confirmation
email.printed.title: Order Confirmation - SignXpert
email.printed.heading: Your order has been confirmed – SignXpert
email.printed.reviewIntro: We have successfully received your order and our team is now carefully reviewing all project details to ensure everything is exactly as requested. Once the review is complete, your order will move straight into production.
email.printed.shipmentReady: As soon as your order is completed, packed, and ready for shipment, you will receive another email with your tracking number.
email.printed.anyQuestions: If you have any questions or need any assistance, we are always happy to help.
email.shipped.subject: SignXpert - Order Shipped
email.shipped.title: Your order has been shipped - SignXpert
email.shipped.heading: Your order has been shipped – Tracking available
email.shipped.shippedVia: Your order has now been shipped via UPS and is on its way to you.
email.shipped.trackBelow: You can track your order directly on the UPS website by clicking the link below:
email.shipped.upsActiveNote: Please note that it may take some time for the tracking number to become active in the UPS system. Once active, you can follow the journey of your package and see its current status.
email.shipped.checkStatus: You can also always check the detailed status of your order in your account.
email.shipped.thankYouEnjoy: Thank you for choosing SignXpert — we hope you enjoy your custom signs!
email.shipped.dontHesitate: If you have any questions or need assistance, don't hesitate to contact us.
email.invoice.subject: SignXpert – Invoice
email.invoice.title: Your invoice is ready - SignXpert
email.invoice.heading: Your invoice is ready – SignXpert
email.invoice.thankYouOrder: Thank you for your order and for choosing
email.invoice.attached: Please find your invoice attached to this email.
email.invoice.viewSettleIntro: You can also view and settle your invoice at any time via our website:
email.invoice.simplyLogInNavigate: Simply log in and navigate to:
email.invoice.selectClickPay: Select the relevant order and click
email.invoice.multiplePaymentMethods: Multiple secure payment methods are available directly in your account.
email.invoice.bankTransferQuote: If you prefer to pay by bank transfer, please use the bank details provided on the invoice and make sure to quote:
email.invoice.helpAllocate: This helps us allocate your payment correctly.
email.invoice.updateBilling: Should you wish to update your billing address or the email address used for receiving invoices, you can do so in:
email.invoice.alreadyPaidDisregard: If you have already completed the payment, please disregard this message. You can check your payment status at any time in your account under
email.invoice.appreciate: We truly appreciate your business and look forward to working with you again.
email.delivered.subject: SignXpert -  Order Delivered
email.delivered.title: Your order has been delivered - SignXpert
email.delivered.heading: Your order has been delivered
email.delivered.goodNewsDelivered: Your order has been successfully delivered.
email.delivered.hopeExpectations: We hope everything meets your expectations and that you are happy with your custom signs.
email.delivered.askForReview: We would be grateful if you could take a moment to leave us a review — your feedback helps us improve and continue providing the best service.
email.delivered.contactIfUnusual: If you notice anything unusual or have any questions, please don’t hesitate to
email.delivered.usHelp: us — we are always happy to help.
email.delivered.welcomeBack: We can’t wait to welcome you back and help bring your next custom project to life.
email.errorDelivery.subject: SignXpert -  Problem with Delivery
email.errorDelivery.title: Delivery Issue Notification
email.errorDelivery.heading: Issue with your delivery — Action required
email.errorDelivery.carrierReport: The carrier has reported an issue with the delivery of your order.
email.errorDelivery.contactConfirm: Please contact us as soon as possible to confirm the correct delivery details or resolve the issue.
email.errorDelivery.updateCarrier: We will update the carrier immediately to ensure your order reaches you without further delay.
email.reminder.subject: SignXpert – Friendly Reminder: Invoice
email.reminder.title: Invoice Reminder
email.reminder.heading: Friendly Reminder - Your Invoice is Due
email.reminder.enjoyingSigns: We hope you are enjoying your custom signs!
email.reminder.outstandingNote: This is just a friendly reminder that the invoice for your recent order (Invoice #{orderNumber}) is still outstanding. If you have already made the payment, please disregard this message. Please find your invoice attached to this email.
email.reminder.appreciateBusiness: We truly appreciate your business and look forward to working with you again soon!
email.reminder.paymentStatusNote: You can check your payment status at any time in your account under
email.contact.adminIntro: You have received a new message via the contact form.
email.contact.userReceived: We have received your message and will get back to you as soon as possible.
email.contact.copyHeading: Here is a copy of your message:
email.contact.urgentNote: If your request is urgent, feel free to contact us directly.
pdf.invoice.title: INVOICE
pdf.invoice.onlinePaymentLine1: If you would like to pay by card or use any of the other online payment methods available, please visit:
pdf.invoice.onlinePaymentLine2: Log in to your account and go to:
pdf.invoice.onlinePaymentLine3: Select the relevant invoice and click “Pay” to complete your payment securely.
pdf.deliveryNote.title: Delivery Note
pdf.deliveryNote.noSignsForOrder: No sign details available for this order.
pdf.deliveryNote.footerCheck: Please check the delivery upon receipt.
pdf.deliveryNote.footerIfIssues: If any items are missing, damaged, or incorrect, please notify us by email at the address stated above.
errors.failedPasswordRecovery: Failed to send password recovery email
